Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce event log with case_id order_id activity name timestamp resource actor optional other attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to derive events Order Created from Orders table resource sales_person_id Items Picked from order lines Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery Invoice Issued from Invoice Payment Received from Payments

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For each line item produce event like Item Picked with timestamp item_picking_date resource picker_id Or produce one aggregated Items Picked per order with a timestamp maybe min date but that loses per item detail Likely we produce per line item event Activity Item Picked Include item_id and quantity as other attribute

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order Lines list them 1001 ITEM 001 qty2 picker WH 001 date 2024 01 02T10 15 00Z 1001 ITEM 002 qty1 picker WH 002 date 2024 01 02T11 00 00Z 1002 ITEM 003 qty4 picker WH 002 date 2024 01 03T09 45 00Z 1002 ITEM 005 qty2 picker WH 001 date 2024 01 03T10 00 00Z 1003 ITEM 002 qty1 picker WH 003 date 2024 01 05T15 30 00Z 1003 ITEM 006 qty3 picker WH 001 date 2024 01 05T15 45 00Z 1004 ITEM 001 qty5 picker WH 002 date 2024 01 06T08 00 00Z 1005 ITEM 007 qty10 picker WH 003 date 2024 01 06T09 30 00Z 1005 ITEM 002 qty2 picker WH 002 date 2024 01 06T09 45 00Z

Text: Delivery DLV 5001 order 1001 dispatch 2024 01 03T08 30 00Z arrival 2024 01 05T14 45 00Z carrier CR 01 DLV 5002 order 1002 dispatch 2024 01 04T07 20 00Z arrival 2024 01 07T16 10 00Z carrier CR 02 DLV 5003 order 1002 dispatch 2024 01 05T07 00 00Z arrival 2024 01 08T10 00 00Z carrier CR 01 DLV 5004 order 1003 dispatch 2024 01 06T07 30 00Z arrival 2024 01 07T20 00 00Z carrier CR 03 DLV 5005 order 1005 dispatch 2024 01 07T10 15 00Z arrival 2024 01 09T11 45 00Z carrier CR 02

Text: Invoice INV 1001 order 1001 issue 2024 01 06T09 00 00Z amount 250 BL 001 INV 1002 order 1002 issue 2024 01 08T10 15 00Z amount 400 BL 002 INV 1003 order 1002 issue 2024 01 10T11 00 00Z amount 100 BL 002 INV 1004 order 1003 issue 2024 01 09T08 00 00Z amount 150 BL 001 INV 1005 order 1005 issue 2024 01 10T09 30 00Z amount 500 BL 003

Text: Payments PAY 2001 invoice INV 1001 date 2024 01 10T11 30 00Z method Credit Card PAY 2002 invoice INV 1002 date 2024 01 12T14 00 00Z method Wire Transfer PAY 2003 invoice INV 1003 date 2024 01 15T09 00 00Z method Check PAY 2004 invoice INV 1004 date 2024 01 11T10 30 00Z method Credit Card PAY 2005 invoice INV 1005 date 2024 01 15T12 00 00Z method Credit Card

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource mapping SP 001 Alice Brown SP 002 Bob Smith SP 003 Charlie Kim WH 001 David Lin WH 002 Eva Johnson WH 003 Frank Miller CR 01 GlobalTransport CR 02 FastShip CR 03 AirExpress BL 001 Gina Carter BL 002 Harry Lee BL 003 Irene Park

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now produce event rows We will sort by order_id and timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1001 events Order Created Item Picked ITEM 001 Item Picked ITEM 002 Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1002 events Order Created Item Picked ITEM 003 Item Picked ITEM 005 Order Dispatched DLV 5002 Order Arrived DLV 5002 Order Dispatched DLV 5003 Order Arrived DLV 5003 Invoice Issued INV 1002 Invoice Issued INV 1003 Payment Received PAY 2002 Payment Received PAY 2003

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check ordering after dispatch of DLV 5003 2024 01 05 before arrival of DLV 5002 2024 01 07 okay

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1003 events Order Created Item Picked ITEM 002 Item Picked ITEM 006 Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1004 events Order Created Item Picked ITEM 001 No delivery invoice payment data for order 1004 missing We will still include events we have

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For payment we could leave resource blank or use payment_method as attribute

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1005 events Order Created Item Picked ITEM 007 Item Picked ITEM 002 Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Other Attributes column can be semicolon separated For Item Picked item_id quantity For Invoice Issued invoice_amount For Payment Received payment_method payment_reference For Order Dispatched and Arrived maybe carrier_id For Order Created maybe customer_id order_priority
